abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single configuration of Dwains Dashboard is allowed.

init.title: Dwains Dashboard Settings
init.description: These settings are stored in dwains-dashboard/configs/settings.yaml.

data_description.area_sensor_device_classes: Select the sensor device classes that should be shown on area tiles below the area name. Select nothing to show nothing.

restart_required.title: Restart required to finish disabling Dwains Dashboard

confirm.title: Restart Home Assistant
confirm.description:
Dwains Dashboard registers a sidebar dashboard and frontend resources that can only be fully removed by restarting Home Assistant.

Select **Submit** to restart now.
